_schema.description: Product reference images + material specs for Nano Banana 2 image pipeline

fields.name: Product name (from catalog)
fields.reference_image: Primary front reference (techflat or product photo)
fields.reference_back: Back panel reference if distinct file exists
fields.material_notes: Free-form notes for nuanced rendering guidance

_schema.usage: Loaded by nano_banana.catalog.load_references() and injected into generation prompts

br-001.name: BLACK Rose Crewneck
br-001.material_notes: 3D dimensional rose, layered spiral petals, brushed rose-gold finish embossed into fabric

br-002.name: BLACK Rose Joggers
br-002.material_notes: Glossy smooth silicone patch on left thigh, die-cut edges, rose-gold metallic (~3-4 in)

br-003.name: BLACK is Beautiful Jersey
br-003.material_notes: BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL text front, custom baseball patch bottom left, embroidered rose logo on back

br-003-giants.name: BLACK is Beautiful Jersey (Giants)
br-003-giants.material_notes: BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL text front + custom baseball patch, embroidered rose logo on back

br-003-oakland.name: BLACK is Beautiful Jersey (Oakland)
br-003-oakland.material_notes: A in BLACK is black lettering, rest is gold. Custom patch bottom left, embroidered rose back

br-003-white.name: BLACK is Beautiful Jersey (White)
br-003-white.material_notes: White base jersey, BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL text + patch front, embroidered rose logo back

br-004.name: BLACK Rose Hoodie
br-004.material_notes: Large detailed rose growing from clouds, embroidered centered on front chest

br-005.name: BLACK Rose Hoodie — Signature Edition
br-005.material_notes: Small silicone cutout rose on RIGHT chest (~3 in). Large embroidered rose on SIDE of hoodie body (NOT sleeve). Hood lining: all-over sublimated rose pattern

br-006.name: BLACK Rose Sherpa Jacket
br-006.material_notes: Satin hooded bomber jacket, BLACK sherpa lining. Small embroidered rose left chest (~5 in), large embroidered rose on back (~12 in)

br-007.name: BLACK Rose x Love Hurts Basketball Shorts
br-007.material_notes: Tackle-twill OAKLAND on waistband. Sublimated rose logo all-over. Large LOVE HURTS logo on left side. Stitched logos on mesh side panels

br-008.name: BLACK is Beautiful Jersey Series: 1. SF inspired
br-008.material_notes: Football jersey #80. FRONT: 8 has rose logo INSIDE digit, 0 is plain white. BACK: reversed. Custom football patch bottom left

br-009.name: BLACK is Beautiful Jersey Series: 2. LAST OAKLAND
br-009.material_notes: Football jersey #32. FRONT: 3 has rose logo INSIDE digit, 2 is plain white. BACK: reversed. Custom football patch bottom left

br-010.name: BLACK is Beautiful Jersey Series: 3. THE BAY
br-010.material_notes: THE BAY bold gold text front, circular rose below in rose-gold, lower half grey/silver gradient

br-011.name: BLACK is Beautiful Jersey Series: 4. THE ROSE (SHARKS EDITION)
br-011.material_notes: Hooded hockey jersey teal/black. Large circular rose crest front. Back: BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL cyan text + rose-filled #0

kids-001.name: Kids Red Set
kids-001.material_notes: RED colorblock. Black rose embroidered on left chest + left thigh. Right arm: circular woven patch (white bg, black lettering, Skyy Rose / Collection)

kids-002.name: Kids Purple Set
kids-002.material_notes: PURPLE colorblock. Black rose embroidered on left chest + left thigh. Right arm: circular woven patch (white bg, black lettering, Skyy Rose / Collection)

lh-002.name: Love Hurts Joggers
lh-002.material_notes: TWO VARIANTS: white w/ black stripe, black w/ white stripe. Love Hurts heart-and-rose logo on LEFT thigh (cracked red heart, thorny branches, three roses, blood drips)

lh-003.name: Love Hurts Basketball Shorts
lh-003.material_notes: Sublimated rose logo all-over. Large Love Hurts logo on left side. Additional Love Hurts and rose logos stitched on mesh side panels

lh-004.name: Love Hurts Varsity Jacket
lh-004.material_notes: LOVE HURTS red graffiti script across front. Inside hood: sublimated rose pattern. Back: Love Hurts heart-and-rose logo centered (cracked heart, thorny branches, roses)

lh-006.name: The Fannie
lh-006.material_notes: High-end leather fanny pack. Fannie script on front. Heart-and-rose logo replaces the DOT on the letter I in Fannie

sg-001.name: The Bridge Series 'The Bay Bridge' Shorts
sg-001.material_notes: Sublimated Bay Bridge image covering entire shorts. Blue embroidered rose on bottom left

sg-002.name: The Bridge Series 'Stay Golden' Shirt
sg-002.material_notes: Embroidered rose on front chest with Golden Gate Bridge imagery STITCHED INSIDE the rose petals

sg-003.name: The Bridge Series 'Stay Golden' Shorts
sg-003.material_notes: Sublimated Golden Gate Bridge image covering entire shorts. Purple embroidered rose on bottom left

sg-004.name: The Signature Hoodie
sg-004.material_notes: No branding treatment specified in spec

sg-005.name: The Bridge Series 'The Bay Bridge' Shirt
sg-005.material_notes: White crewneck. Embroidered rose on front chest center with Bay Bridge imagery STITCHED INSIDE rose petals. SR monogram at back collar

sg-006.name: Mint & Lavender Hoodie
sg-006.material_notes: Mint green hoodie. Lavender rose logo embroidered centered on front. Large detailed rose with petals and leaves

sg-007.name: The Signature Beanie
sg-007.material_notes: Small silicone patch (~2 in), slightly off to LEFT side of brim. THREE COLORWAYS: red rose, grey-and-black rose, purple rose

sg-009.name: The Sherpa Jacket
sg-009.material_notes: Black nylon zip-front jacket. White sherpa at collar and interior. RED embroidered rose logo on front (~3 in). NOT hooded — collar only

sg-011.name: Original Label Tee (White)
sg-011.material_notes: White tee. THE SKYROSE COLLECTION SCRIPT in gold foil — THE in serifed caps, Skyy Rose in cursive, Collection in spaced caps

sg-012.name: Original Label Tee (Orchid)
sg-012.material_notes: Orchid/purple tee. Same gold foil layout as sg-011

sg-013.name: Mint & Lavender Crewneck
sg-013.material_notes: Mint green crewneck. Lavender rose embroidered centered on front. Small embroidered logo on back of neck

sg-014.name: Mint & Lavender Sweatpants
sg-014.material_notes: Mint/lavender sweatpants. Embroidered rose logo on left thigh in lavender thread
